title: Infini Rockets! 🚀
body:
# Infini Rockets! 🚀
Have you ever just wanted to fly around in your creative world and always had to carry, like 10 stacks of rockets? Well, this datapack solves that! Just carry one rocket, and it always refills it!
## Notes
- This datapack can be added to any existing world
- If this datapack is annoying you after you are done, you can do the commands /datapack disable "file/Infini Rockets!" and /datapack enable "file/Infini Rockets!"
- I know this datapack is utterly USELESS, but I have hope, so please download this datapack 🙏.
